mapper.select: with recursive CODE_LIST(SYS_CD, P_SYS_CD, SYS_TP, SYS_NM, SYS_DS_LST, SYS_DESC, DEPTH, PATH, CYCLE, CRET_DT, CRET_USER_ID, UPDT_DT, UPDT_USER_ID) as ( select A.SYS_CD, A.P_SYS_CD, A.SYS_TP, A.SYS_NM, A.SYS_DS_LST, A.SYS_DESC, 1, array[A.SYS_NM::text], false, A.CRET_DT, A.CRET_USER_ID, A.UPDT_DT, A.UPDT_USER_ID from TB_SYS_INFO A where A.P_SYS_CD is null union all select A.SYS_CD, A.P_SYS_CD, A.SYS_TP, A.SYS_NM, A.SYS_DS_LST, A.SYS_DESC, B.DEPTH + 1, array_append(B.PATH,A.SYS_NM::text), A.SYS_CD = any(B.PATH), A.CRET_DT, A.CRET_USER_ID, A.UPDT_DT, A.UPDT_USER_ID from TB_SYS_INFO A, CODE_LIST B where A.P_SYS_CD = B.SYS_CD and not CYCLE ) select SYS_CD, P_SYS_CD, SYS_NM, SYS_TP, SYS_DS_LST, SYS_DESC, DEPTH, PATH, to_char(to_timestamp(CRET_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as CRET_DT, CRET_USER_ID, to_char(to_timestamp(UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as UPDT_DT, UPDT_USER_ID from CODE_LIST order by PATH

with recursive CODE_LIST(SYS_CD, P_SYS_CD, SYS_TP, SYS_NM, SYS_DS_LST, SYS_DESC, DEPTH, PATH, CYCLE, CRET_DT, CRET_USER_ID, UPDT_DT, UPDT_USER_ID) as ( select A.SYS_CD, A.P_SYS_CD, A.SYS_TP, A.SYS_NM, A.SYS_DS_LST, A.SYS_DESC, 1, array[A.SYS_NM::text], false, A.CRET_DT, A.CRET_USER_ID, A.UPDT_DT, A.UPDT_USER_ID from TB_SYS_INFO A where A.P_SYS_CD is null union all select A.SYS_CD, A.P_SYS_CD, A.SYS_TP, A.SYS_NM, A.SYS_DS_LST, A.SYS_DESC, B.DEPTH + 1, array_append(B.PATH,A.SYS_NM::text), A.SYS_CD = any(B.PATH), A.CRET_DT, A.CRET_USER_ID, A.UPDT_DT, A.UPDT_USER_ID from TB_SYS_INFO A, CODE_LIST B where A.P_SYS_CD = B.SYS_CD and not CYCLE ) select SYS_CD, P_SYS_CD, SYS_NM, SYS_TP, SYS_DS_LST, SYS_DESC, DEPTH, PATH, to_char(to_timestamp(CRET_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as CRET_DT, CRET_USER_ID, to_char(to_timestamp(UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as UPDT_DT, UPDT_USER_ID from CODE_LIST where SYS_CD = #{sysCd} order by PATH
select SYS_CD, P_SYS_CD, SYS_TP, SYS_NM, SYS_DESC, CRET_DT, CRET_USER_ID, UPDT_DT, UPDT_USER_ID from TB_SYS_INFO where SYS_NM = #{sysNm}

SELECT DS_ID as id ,DSN as dsn ,DS_TP as dsTp ,DBMS_TP as dbmsTp ,DRIVER_NM as driverName ,SVR_ADDR as svrAddr ,PORT as port ,USER_ID as userId ,PWD as pwd ,CHARSET as charSet ,PRIVATE_KEY as privateKey ,DB_NAME as dbName ,RM_DIR as rmDir FROM ndata.tb_data_source

with recursive CODE_LIST(SYS_CD, P_SYS_CD, SYS_DS_LST, DEPTH, PATH, CYCLE) as ( select A.SYS_CD, A.P_SYS_CD, A.SYS_DS_LST, 1, array[A.SYS_NM::text], false from TB_SYS_INFO A where A.SYS_CD = #{sysCd} union all select A.SYS_CD, A.P_SYS_CD, A.SYS_DS_LST, B.DEPTH + 1, array_append(B.PATH,A.SYS_NM::text), A.SYS_CD = any(B.PATH) from TB_SYS_INFO A, CODE_LIST B where A.P_SYS_CD = B.SYS_CD and not CYCLE ) SELECT distinct DS_ID as id ,DSN as dsn ,DS_TP as dsTp ,DBMS_TP as dbmsTp FROM ndata.tb_data_source WHERE DS_ID IN (SELECT UNNEST(CASE WHEN array_length(SYS_DS_LST, 1) >= 1 THEN SYS_DS_LST ELSE '{null}'::text[] END ) FROM CODE_LIST)

SELECT DS_ID as id ,DSN as dsn ,DS_TP as dsTp ,DBMS_TP as dbmsTp ,DRIVER_NM as driverName ,SVR_ADDR as svrAddr ,PORT as port ,USER_ID as userId ,PWD as pwd ,CHARSET as charSet ,PRIVATE_KEY as privateKey ,DB_NAME as dbName ,RM_DIR as rmDir ,CONN_PROPS as connProps ,SECURE_YN as useSecure FROM ndata.tb_data_source WHERE DS_ID = #{id}

SELECT DS_ID as id ,DSN as dsn ,DS_TP as dsTp ,DBMS_TP as dbmsTp ,DRIVER_NM as driverName ,SVR_ADDR as svrAddr ,PORT as port ,USER_ID as userId ,PWD as pwd ,CHARSET as charSet ,PRIVATE_KEY as privateKey ,DB_NAME as dbName ,RM_DIR as rmDir ,CONN_PROPS as connProps ,SECURE_YN as useSecure FROM ndata.tb_data_source WHERE DS_TP = #{dsTp}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM ndata.tb_data_source WHERE DS_ID IN
#{item.id}
